name: tas-king
description: Tablero de tareas minimalista — Iteración 2.5 (Cloudflare Workers + D1 + R2)

scripts.deploy: npm run verify-ready && wrangler deploy && npm run db:migrate:remote
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run verify-ready && wrangler deploy --env staging && npm run db:migrate:staging
scripts.dev:e2e: npm run e2e:setup && npm run e2e:server
scripts.db:migrate:staging: wrangler d1 migrations apply tas-king-staging --remote --env staging
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 migrations apply tas-king --remote --env production
scripts.verify-ready: npm run test:all && echo '✅ Tests passed' && (git status --porcelain | grep -E '^\.dev\.vars' && echo '❌ .dev.vars debe estar en .gitignore' && exit 1 || true) && (git diff --cached --name-only | grep -E '(dev\.vars|secret)' && echo '❌ No commitear secrets' && exit 1 || true) && echo '✅ Listo para push'
